rationale: The citing paper note focuses on FDA-approval event-study CAR decomposition, postlaunch advertising allocation, and VAR-based sales effects, with no indication that conjoint estimation is used. The cited paper is a Monte Carlo comparison of hierarchical Bayes vs finite-mixture conjoint models for partworth recovery on synthetic conjoint data, which is not aligned with the citing paper’s stated methods or constructs. Given only a DOI match and no in-text evidence of substantive use, this appears to be an obvious mention-only citation.
